note: Official download task. Data not auto-fetched (use the URLs in source). Place official DESI DR2 BAO compressed measurements + full covariance here, update sha256, set sample_data=False, compressed_bao_vector_status=READY, covariance_status=READY. Then run cert with --mode desi_dr2_official.
